generator: derived repo asset pass from existing OpenAI albedo maps; no Meshy retexture; no new 3D generation
target_use: Three.js Alpha control and model assay painted-realism review path

visual_doctrine.primary_rule: The albedo must carry the tank. If the flat color map cannot read as painted realism, PBR maps are not allowed to rescue it.
standalone_acceptance: olive albedo reads as painted field-maintained olive drab steel with dust, grime, and wear language
tread albedo reads as worn track/rubber/road grime material before motion or shader detail helps it
barrel and armor must not read as black or untextured when using the olive albedo
crew identity and battlefield use must be visible through paint, wear, markings, dirt, and field repair color

runtime_policy.runtime_materials: MeshStandardMaterial with base color map only plus fixed scalar roughness/metalness
runtime_policy.old_pbr_folder_policy: preserve for rollback/comparison; do not require for active Alpha review

notes: This is an albedo isolation pass. It intentionally removes shader-map ambiguity from the visual review.
If the screenshot still reads weak, replace the albedo artwork instead of reintroducing PBR maps.
